page.title: Morning Dispatch
page.subtitle: Per-crew plans based on ripeness, shared as a bilingual card — owner-initiated

board.noCrews: No crews on the roster yet — enroll a crew on the Crew page to dispatch.
board.noDispatch: No dispatch yet — generate the ripeness-aware plan for {crewName}.

assignments.title: Assignments
assignments.noWorkers: No workers on the crew roster

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
lifecycle.supersededNote: This dispatch was replaced by a newer one (history).

ack.title: Crew acknowledgment
ack.confirmedBody: The lead marked the card as received in the group.
ack.sentBody: The card was shared; confirmation arrives when the lead replies.
ack.draftBody: This card is still a draft; share it to start the day.
ack.injectionNote: The acknowledgment is only proof of receipt. Inbound text from the crew never triggers an action — dispatch is outbound and owner-initiated.

share.markSentError: Couldn’t mark as sent. Try again.

generate.label: {label} for {crewName}
generate.error: Could not draft the dispatch. Try again.
